Data Processing Addendum (UAE PDPL) between Rimal Oasis Holdings PJSC and Cloud Dunes FZ-LLC; effective 2026-06-05.
Controller/Processor: Rimal Oasis Holdings PJSC (Dubai Trade Licence No. DED-912345; TRN 100123456789012) as Controller; Cloud Dunes FZ-LLC (ADGM Licence No. ADGM-CR-009876) as Processor.
Scope: processing PDPL personal data and SCA-relevant MNPI in connection with DFM/ADX issuer due diligence, financing, and listing readiness.
Categories: Emirates ID 784-2028-6543210-3 (example only), passport copy, stated family origin (optional KYC field), corporate registry extracts, and contact details for Ms. Samira Al Qudra, CFO, samira.alqudra@rimaloasis.ae, +971-50-555-0123.
Legal basis and purpose: PDPL Art. 4(1)(a) consent and contractual necessity; MNPI handled under SCA market conduct rules; DIFC/ADGM equivalents apply in free zone hosting.
Transfers: default UAE residency; limited cross-border transfer to vetted vendors under SCC-style clauses and ADGM DPR 2021 adequacy; no onward transfer without written approval.
Subprocessors: Oryxon Cloud Services LLC (Sharjah Free Zone) for hosting; Falak Analytics DMCC for data rooms; full list available on request.
Retention: Emirates ID and trade licence copies retained 5 years post-transaction; MNPI in “Project Palm” folders deleted 30 days after public disclosure on DFM/ADX.
Security: role-based access, audit logging in DIFC-compliant systems, encryption at rest/in transit, and segregation of MNPI workspaces for deal teams only.
DSAR: submit to privacy@rimaloasis.ae or +971 4 555 0100; we will verify identity by checking Emirates ID or passport details without retaining unnecessary pages.
Note: public helpline 800-0000 is not a verification channel and generic form fields (Full Name: ______; Email: ______; Role: Compliance Officer) are non-binding placeholders.
Payment of DSAR postage/fees: provide UAE IBAN AE12 0000 1234 5678 9012 345 for refunds to Rimal Oasis Holdings PJSC; alternative accounts require written confirmation.
Invalid examples: Passport No. P0000000 and Emirates ID 784-0000-0000000-0 in sample forms are placeholders with invalid checksums and will be rejected.
Data subject contact and accountability: DPO Mr. Karim Al Badri, dpo@rimaloasis.ae; registered office Unit 1708, Marina Dunes Tower, Al Seef District, Dubai, UAE.
Complaints: contact the UAE Data Office or the DIFC Commissioner of Data Protection; suspected market abuse or MNPI breaches escalated to SCA and the issuer’s compliance lead.
